name: Merrill Lynch Financial Advisor Gerard Andrews
description_short: The Andrews Group is a Merrill Lynch wealth management advisory team in Midtown Manhattan offering personalized financial planning, investment management, and banking services to high-net-worth clients.
description_long:
The Andrews Group operates as part of Merrill Lynch Wealth Management, a subsidiary of Bank of America, based in One Bryant Park in New York's Midtown Manhattan. Gerard Andrews serves as Managing Director and Wealth Management Advisor, leading a team focused on personalized wealth advisory services. The firm has earned recognition as a Forbes 'Best-in-State Wealth Advisor' (2021-2026) and their team received Forbes 'Best-in-State Wealth Management Teams' recognition (2023-2026).

The Andrews Group provides comprehensive wealth management services including investment portfolio management, retirement planning, personal banking, lending products, insurance solutions, and wealth planning services. They leverage Merrill Lynch's investment research and Bank of America's banking infrastructure to deliver integrated financial solutions. Their service offerings span domestic and international equity and fixed-income investments, with emphasis on customized asset allocation strategies and capital preservation alongside growth objectives.

What distinguishes The Andrews Group is their stated philosophy of placing the investor at the center of their focus rather than market performance. They emphasize relationship-building through understanding clients' personal circumstances, family priorities, and individual definitions of success. The team offers access to institutional-grade investment insights and research capabilities while maintaining a local presence in Manhattan. They position their approach around transparent communication and alignment of investment strategy with client values and life priorities.

As a Merrill Lynch advisory team, The Andrews Group operates within a major institutional framework with full regulatory oversight by FINRA and SEC. However, as wealth management advisors rather than independent fiduciaries in all contexts, clients should verify the specific advisory relationship structure and fee arrangements. The firm primarily serves high-net-worth individuals and families rather than mass-market consumers, which limits accessibility for those with smaller investment portfolios. Their location in Manhattan may also present geographic limitations for prospective clients outside the New York area.
address: 1 Bryant Pk 3rd Floor, New York, NY 10036

company_info.headquarters: 1 Bryant Pk 3rd Floor, New York, NY 10036

pros: Forbes recognized as 'Best-in-State Wealth Advisor' for six consecutive years (2021-2026)
Integrated access to both Merrill Lynch investment research and Bank of America banking products
Personalized approach emphasizing understanding client life priorities and goals before recommending strategies
Managing Director-level advisor with established track record and team-based support structure
Comprehensive service offerings including investments, retirement planning, lending, insurance, and wealth planning
Focus on capital preservation combined with growth strategy across domestic and international markets
Institutional resources and intellectual capital from Merrill Lynch supporting customized portfolio construction
cons: Primarily serves high-net-worth clients, making services generally inaccessible to mass-market consumers with smaller portfolios
Physical location limited to Manhattan office at One Bryant Park, restricting convenience for clients outside NYC area
Website provides limited transparency regarding specific fee structures, minimum account sizes, or detailed service pricing
As Merrill Lynch advisors, not independent fiduciaries in all contexts—potential conflicts of interest favoring proprietary products
No information provided about specific credentials, certifications, or detailed professional backgrounds of individual team members
best_for: High-net-worth individuals and families in the New York metropolitan area seeking comprehensive wealth management
Business owners and executives requiring coordinated investment, banking, and wealth planning services
Clients who value relationship-based advisory with emphasis on personal goal-setting and life priorities over purely performance-driven strategies
diagnosis: The Andrews Group is best suited for affluent individuals and families in the New York area seeking personalized wealth management from an established Merrill Lynch advisor with institutional backing and Forbes recognition. The primary caveat is that this is a high-end service targeting high-net-worth clients—those with modest assets or those outside the NYC region will likely find limited utility, and prospective clients should clarify minimum account requirements and fee structures before engaging.
services: Personalized investment portfolio management and asset allocation
Retirement planning and retirement savings account management
Wealth planning and estate planning advisory
Personal banking products and checking/savings accounts
Lending and credit products through Bank of America
Ongoing portfolio monitoring and strategy adjustment
Access to investment insights and research from Merrill Lynch
